steps.title: Determine the outer rectangle dimensions
steps.content:
Since the concrete path is x feet wide on all sides, it adds x feet in each direction. The outer rectangle has dimensions:
  • Length: 21 + 2x feet
  • Width: 11 + 2x feet

steps.title: Set up and expand the area equation
steps.content:
The path area equals the outer rectangle area minus the pool area:
$$(21 + 2x)(11 + 2x) - 231 = 144$$
Expand the left side:
$$231 + 42x + 22x + 4x^2 - 231 = 144$$
Simplify:
$$4x^2 + 64x = 144$$
Divide by 4:
$$x^2 + 16x - 36 = 0$$

steps.title: Factor and solve
steps.content: The quadratic $x^2 + 16x - 36 = 0$ factors as $(x - 2)(x + 18) = 0$. This gives $x = 2$ or $x = -18$. Since $x$ represents a width, we need $x > 0$, so $x = 2$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
